summary: Bootstrap the control mesh around OpenHands, Obsidian, Qdrant, and the local coding tools while keeping localhost-only exposure for the core OpenHands UI.
decisions: Use Obsidian as the control and memory layer.
Keep OpenHands on 127.0.0.1:3000 and proxy LAN traffic through Caddy with mutual TLS.
Gate risky actions even when recursion and compaction are automatic.
blockers: LM Studio may be unavailable and must be treated as degraded mode.
